notes: Holbrook Zoning By-Law (Sept 2019; holbrookma.gov/372 DocumentCenter PDF); Table of Use Regulations (Appendix A). Use-table columns Res I-V / Bus I / Bus II / BV / BC / I; MAPC (strip 133) gives R1-R5=Res I-V, B1=Bus I, B2=Bus II, BC, I (bylaw 'BV' not in MAPC vocab). MAPC 'W' (Water) not a use-table district -> nonbinding. Named use 'Self Service Storage Warehouse' = PB (special permit) in Bus I/II/BV/BC/I.
